diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,153 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+
+- Purpose: Main Hono entry point class that extends HonoBase, configuring default SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter fallbacks.
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, HonoOptions, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema.
+- Simple note: Default router creates a SmartRouter backed by RegExpRouter and TrieRouter for matching.
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+
+- Purpose: Base Hono class with core request handling logic, method routing (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, etc.), middleware composition, and handler execution.
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, HonoOptions, Context, Router, METHODS, METHOD_NAME_ALL, compose, getPath, getPathNoStrict, mergePath, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, Env, H, HandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandler, Next, RouterRoute, Schema, COMPOSED_HANDLER.
+- Simple note: Implements app.get, app.post, and app.request while delegating to router for path matching.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Export module for PatternRouter.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter.
+- Simple note: Thin wrapper that re-exports PatternRouter class.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: PatternRouter implements regex-based route matching by converting paths to Regular Expressions at registration time.
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter, Route, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, RegExp, Params, Result, Router, emptyParams, endsWithWildcard.
+- Simple note: Routes converted to compiled regex patterns; supports optional params (?:), wildcards (*), and named params (:name).
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Export module for LinearRouter.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter.
+- Simple note: Wrapper that re-exports LinearRouter class.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: LinearRouter performs linear scan of route table at match time, supporting static, labeled, and wildcard paths.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, RegExpMatchArrayWithIndices, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, emptyParams, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe.
+- Simple note: Route array indexed by registration order; match method loops until first successful handler found or no match.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Export module for RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter with serialization support.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams.
+- Simple note: Two export points; PreparedRegExpRouter enables runtime serialization of compiled matchers.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: RegExpRouter builds a regex matcher from preprocessed routes at build time for O(1) matching performance.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, StaticMap, HandlerData, ParamIndexMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, ParamAssocArray, Node, Trie, ParamIndexMap, buildWildcardRegExp, clearWildcardRegExpCache, findMiddleware, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, match, emptyParam.
+- Simple note: Routes stored as [method][path] maps; build() compiles trie to regex; match() uses compiled matcher with static route lookup.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+
+- Purpose: Matcher interface combines RegExp, handler data array, and static route map for fast matching.
+- Names noticed: Matcher, HandlerData, StaticMap, Result, Router, ParamIndexMap, MatcherMap, ParamStash, emptyParam, match.
+- Simple note: match() first checks staticMap for exact path, falls back to RegExp match, returns handlers and param index mapping.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+
+- Purpose: PreparedRegExpRouter pre-builds matchers at init time for faster subsequent match calls.
+- Names noticed: PreparedRegExpRouter, RelocateMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, StaticMap, RegExpRouter, match, emptyParam, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams.
+- Simple note: Constructor accepts pre-built matchers and relocate map; add() enforces path must be registered.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+
+- Purpose: Node class constructs trie structure with regex generation during insert.
+- Names noticed: Node, Context, PATH_ERROR, ParamAssocArray, buildRegExpStr, compareKey, childKeys, regExpMetaChars, ONLY_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, TAIL_WILDCARD_REG_EXP_STR, LABEL_REG_EXP_STR.
+- Simple note: Tree of regex segments; compares literal vs pattern vs wildcard; builds combined regex from child keys.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+
+- Purpose: Trie class manages the tree structure and generates final combined regex for router.
+- Names noticed: Trie, Context, Node, ParamAssocArray, ReplacementMap, buildRegExp, captureIndex, indexReplacementMap, paramReplacementMap, groups, regex, RegExp.
+- Simple note: Converts path tokens to regex pattern; replaces markers with backrefs; builds final regex and replacement maps.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Export module for SmartRouter.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter.
+- Simple note: Wrapper that re-exports SmartRouter class.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: SmartRouter orchestrates multiple routers using trial-and-error dispatch strategy.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, Router, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, activeRouter, Result.
+- Simple note: Iterates routers until one succeeds; fallbacks to next router on UnsupportedPathError; name shows active composition.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Export module for TrieRouter.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter.
+- Simple note: Wrapper that re-exports TrieRouter class.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: TrieRouter uses tree traversal at match time for routing decisions.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, Node, checkOptionalParameter, Result, Router.
+- Simple note: insert() builds tree; match() walks tree with queue and pattern matching.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+
+- Purpose: TrieRouter's Node class for tree-based routing with method and path matching.
+- Names noticed: Node, Params, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, HandlerSet, possibleKeys, score, children, patterns, order, params, splitPath, parts, getPattern, pattern, matcher, astNode.
+- Simple note: Each node tracks methods, children, and patterns; search uses recursive queue to collect all matches.
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Shared test suite defining common routing test cases for all router implementations.
+- Names noticed: runTest, RunnerTestSuite, Params, Router, match, skip, task, suite, name, isSkip, GET, POST, PUT, DELETE, OPTIONS, PATCH, ALL, *, *, /**, Reserved words, Complex.
+- Simple note: Factory function runTest configures router, registers routes, runs tests comparing expected matches.
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Tests for PatternRouter implementation against common cases.
+- Names noted: Pattern, runTest, PatternRouter, UnsupportedPathError, Duplicate param name, Trailing slash.
+- Simple note: Skips tests unsupported by PatternRouter (ambiguous routes, regex features); verifies regex-based compilation.
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Tests for LinearRouter implementation against common cases.
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter, runTest, UnsupportedPathError, Multi match, Trailing slash, Skip part.
+- Simple note: Skips regex tests and trailing slash edge case; validates linear table scan behavior.
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Tests for RegExpRouter implementation against common cases plus type verification.
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, runTest, ParamStash, Return value type, UnsupportedPathError, Multiple handlers with different label, parent, child, static and dynamic, Capture Group, Complex capturing group.
+- Simple note: Supports many common cases; rejects ambiguous patterns and complex regex scenarios.
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Tests for SmartRouter with default RegExpRouter+TrieRouter composition.
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter, runTest, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, newRouter.
+- Simple note: Uses combination of both routers; inherits all passed common tests.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Tests for TrieRouter implementation against common cases.
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter, runTest, newRouter.
+- Simple note: Passes full common test suite; handles all patterns including wildcards and regex.
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Unit tests for TrieRouter's Node class tree structure and search logic.
+- Names noticed: Node, Root Node, Basic Usage, Name path, Param prefix, Named params and a wildcard, Wildcard, Regexp, All, Special Wildcard, Default with wildcard, Multi match, Sort Order, Duplicate param name, Routing order With named parameters, The same name is used for path params, Node with initial method and handler.
+- Simple note: Exhaustive tests covering tree insert/search edge cases, parameter extraction, duplicate params, sort order for multiple matches.
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+
+- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts exports src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, which converts routes to regex at registration time.
+- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts exports src/router/linear-router/router.ts, which scans route table linearly at match time with static/labeled/wildcard support.
+- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts exports src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts and src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts; router.ts uses Node and Trie to build matchers; src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts defines Matcher interface; src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts implements tree insert/regex build; src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts generates final regex.
+- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts exports src/router/smart-router/router.ts, which iterates multiple routers until one succeeds.
+- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts exports src/router/trie-router/router.ts; router.ts uses src/router/trie-router/node.ts for tree-based matching with method and path dimensions.
\ No newline at end of file

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

The user wants me to create a benchmark artifact document for a routing-read-write-ledger task. I need to:

1. First check if the bench-artifacts directory exist
